basic_details.job_title: CNCI Senior Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI) Senior Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website www.cnci.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CNCI Senior Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC/PWD and women candidates as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First class M.Sc Degree in Life Sciences
qualification.details: First class M.Sc Degree in Life Sciences. Organized and meticulous in record keeping with excellent interpersonal skills. Experience with operating scientific instruments used in molecular biology/immunology experiments. Experience or aptitude for laboratory management.

selection_process: Email Application Shortlisting Walk-In-Interview/Personal Discussion Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CNCI Senior Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CNCI Senior Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CNCI Senior Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Senior Project Assistant post at CNCI is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class M.Sc Degree in Life Sciences to be eligible for the Senior Project Assistant position at CNCI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Assistant position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD and women candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an email application, followed by shortlisting, a walk-in interview or personal discussion, and document verification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the CNCI Senior Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,600/- per month for the Senior Project Assistant role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job for the Senior Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Senior Project Assistant position at CNCI is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute located?
faq.answer: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700026.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential skills required besides the M.Sc degree?
faq.answer: Besides the M.Sc degree, candidates should have good record-keeping skills, interpersonal skills, experience with scientific instruments, and an aptitude for laboratory management.

faq.question: Q10. How should I send my application for the Senior Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: You need to send your complete application with bio-data and self-attested documents via email to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.
